ordinary_no_progress_guard.fingerprint: ordinary|原因找到了：不是 supabase 单纯挂了，而是分页逻辑有 bug。 第一页查询会限制“近两个月”，但第二页开始只剩 `created_at < 上页最后时间`，把“两个月下限”丢了。所以数据一多触发分页后，就会一路把更早的历史数据也拉下来，响应越来越大，最后浏览器网络层报 `err_quic_protocol_error / failed to fetch`。控制台里看到 `200 (ok)` 也不矛盾：服务端可能返回了 200，但 quic 传输/响应读取阶段断了，js 的 `fetch` 还是失败。 我已经改了 [js/script.js](d:/workspace/web/game-analytics/js/script.js:21)： - 单页批量从 `1000` 降到 `500`，减少大响应触发网络层失败的概率。 - 翻页时每一页都保留时间窗口过滤，不会再无限拉历史数据。 - 游标改成 `created_at + id`，避免同一时间戳的数据漏掉。 - 对 `failed to fetch / quic / err_` 这类瞬时网络错误加了 3 次重试。 验证过： - `node --check ./js/script.js` 通过。 - 新的 supabase/postgrest 游标查询语法返回 `200 ok`，服务端能接受。
ordinary|{"message":"fix paged supabase fetches and retry transient errors"}

ordinary|pushed to `origin/main`. commit: `21652a6 keep error reports available when analytics queries timeout` i only committed `css/style.css` and `js/script.js`; the existing `.omx` local state changes are still unstaged. github also reported the repo has moved to `dlsinnocence/apocalyptic-journey-dashboard.git`, but the push to the current remote still succeeded. ::git-stage{cwd="d:\workspace\web\game-analytics"} ::git-commit{cwd="d:\workspace\web\game-analytics"} ::git-push{cwd="d:\workspace\web\game-analytics" branch="main"}

ordinary|{"suggestions":[{"appid":"","description":"your june 6 validation explicitly left this unverified because the preset login returned `invalid login credentials`, and `index.html` still ships hardcoded placeholder creds. codex can remove the misleading defaults and make the login/export path testable again without relying on fake credentials.","prompt":"fix the broken preset login flow in this dashboard. remove the hardcoded placeholder credentials from the login form, improve the login error ux so failed supabase auth is actionable, and make the authenticated report-download path easier to verify locally. keep the existing static-app structure.","title":"fix the invalid preset login blocking report export checks"},{"appid":"","description":"the latest main-branch change now keeps error reports available while long analytics queries continue in the background, but the ui does not clearly show when reports are fresh and the rest of the dashboard is still cached or stale. codex can add a clear dataset freshness/status indicator so you can trust what you are seeing during triage.","prompt":"add explicit freshness and loading status to the dashboard after the recent timeout fallback changes. show when error reports are fresh, when main analytics or ping data are still loading in the background, and when the page is serving cached data versus live data. keep the current visual style and wire it into the existing loaddata/background refresh flow.","title":"show when reports are fresh but analytics data is still stale"}]}

ordinary|已改成“只分页获取”。 现在行为是： - `dashboard-data` 每次只读一页，默认 `500` 条，最多 `1000` 条。 - edge function 返回当前页聚合结果 + `pagination.nextcursor` + `pagination.hasmore`。 - 前端首屏只加载第一页。 - 页面会显示“已汇总 x 条主数据，还有更多/已到末页”，并提供“加载更多数据”按钮。 - 点“加载更多数据”才请求下一页，并把新页的统计结果合并进当前仪表板。 - 物品详情也改成分页：先算第一页详情，弹窗内可继续加载详情数据。 - 部署用临时 pat 已删除。 - `dashboard-data` 分页版已重新部署。 验证： - `node --check js\script.js` 通过。 - 冒烟请求 `dashboard-data` 带 `pagesize: 1` 返回 200，响应包含 `pagination.hasmore / nextcursor / pagesize` 结构。 - 没有 `export-csv` / pat 残留引用。
